description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON Super Plunder Clears tough clogs with ease. Includes 2 interchangeable suction cups. Ideal for unclogging sinks, toilets, bathtubs and showers. Strong compression chamber for extra suction. 2 attachments for small and large drain cleaning.
